generated_oml:
// C1: Multiplicity - Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:VirtualEntity [
    base:desc "The sole physical entity representing the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle as the sole physical twin in the decentralized twin architecture"
    DTDFVocab:hasComponent PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingFeature, DataPreProcessingFeature, ActuationFeature
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFeature : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands from Digital Twin Entity into voltage commands for Vedder Electronic Speed Controller to control vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFeature : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Interfaces directly with lower-level chassis steering mechanism to adjust vehicle orientation based on DT-generated commands"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingFeature : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Implements remote management commands from Control Panel UI triggering immediate braking via vehicle's speed controller (ISO 15622 performance class I ACC)"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX providing 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in vehicle's proximity"
]

instance DepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i capturing 2D/3D visual data for environmental context"
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors monitoring speed and steering angle via lower-level chassis integration"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hosts ROS2-based data processing pipelines for real-time sensor fusion (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano)"
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction - Data Transmitted
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedFormat "ROS2 message serialization"
]

instance DepthCameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCameraSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedFormat "ROS2 message serialization"
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedFormat "ROS2 message serialization"
]

instance SensorFusionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
    DTDFVocab:producedFormat "ROS2 message serialization"
    DTDFVocab:processingMethod "DBSCAN clustering + Kalman filtering"
]

// C5: Data Models
instance PointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Derived from LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX) and depth camera (Intel D435i) data processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance VehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Real-time speed and steering angle data from onboard sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 performance class I control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, CloudComputing
]

// C6: Virtual Entities
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:VirtualEntity [
    base:desc "Contains Data Collection, Reporting, Visualization Pre-Processing, and ACC Controlling features"
    DTDFVocab:hasComponent DataCollectionFeature, ReportingFeature, VisualizationPreProcessingFeature, ACCControllingFeature
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:VirtualEntity [
    base:desc "Split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel features for monolithic UI decomposition"
    DTDFVocab:hasComponent ThreeDVisualizationFeature, ControlPanelFeature
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:VirtualEntity [
    base:desc "Ensures inter-entity communication compatibility via Data Translation feature"
    DTDFVocab:hasComponent DataTranslationFeature
]

// C7: Data Collection Features
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingFeature : DTDFVocab:Feature [
    base:desc "Hosts Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking functionality using DBSCAN + Kalman filtering for object detection/tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance DataPreProcessingFeature : DTDFVocab:Feature [
    base:desc "Performs unit conversions, message alignment, and formatting via ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance DataCollectionFeature : DTDFVocab:Feature [
    base:desc "Gathers object tracks and ego vehicle state for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
    DTDFVocab:produces ObjectTracksData, EgoVehicleStateData
]

instance DataTranslationFeature : DTDFVocab:Feature [
    base:desc "Ensures inter-entity communication compatibility via ROS2 message serialization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

// C8: Data Types
instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position, velocity, and size data derived from LiDAR/depth camera object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraVisualData
    DTDFVocab:processingMethod "ROS2-based processing"
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time speed and steering angle data from onboard sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:processingMethod "ROS2-based processing"
]

instance SpeedCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired speed commands generated by ACC Controlling feature"
    DTDFVocab:processingMethod "ROS2-based processing"
]

instance ControlCommandsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Remote management commands for emergency braking and speed adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:processingMethod "ROS2-based processing"
]

instance ReportedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries data generated from stored reports"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HistoricalDataStorage
    DTDFVocab:processingMethod "SQL database-backed reporting"
]

instance VisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed 3D visualization data for real-time rendering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData, EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:processingMethod "ROS2-based 3D rendering"
]

// C9: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from resource-constrained vehicle ECUs to cloud-based DT Entity"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
    DTDFVocab:enables NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, CloudComputing
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-in-the-loop operation enabling ACC control adjustments and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlInsight
]

instance SimulationValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical experimentation for ACC design/testing using ROS2 + MATLAB/Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware, MATLABSimulink
]

// C10: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving path"
]

instance HistoricalReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable timeseries reports from stored data"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Lead vehicle detection and speed computation logic (ISO 15622 performance class I)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting desired speed via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate braking triggered via remote management commands"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OperatorControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual feedback for operator control of ACC system"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Experimental validation results from cyber-physical testing"
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication, message passing, and modularity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFeature, PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingFeature, DataCollectionFeature, DataTranslationFeature, VisualizationData
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Compute platform for AI simulation and real-time processing (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano)"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudModel, VehicleStateModel, ACCControlModel, SensorFusionData
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software development kit for NVIDIA Jetson platforms (Jetpack 5.0)"
    DTDFVocab:enables NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFeature, DataCollectionFeature
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware, DataTranslationFeature
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudModel, SimulationValidationService
]

instance CloudComputing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External cloud platform for computation offloading of ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for historical data storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingFeature, ReportedData
]

instance WiFiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wireless network for latency-constrained inter-entity communication (100ms latency)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFeature
]

// C12: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance VehicleHardwareEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuationFeature, SteeringServoActuationFeature, EmergencyBrakingFeature, LiDARSensor, DepthCameraSensor, VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, Python38, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink
]

// C13: Additional Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Speed controller receiving voltage commands from MotorActuationFeature"
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Steering mechanism receiving commands from SteeringServoActuationFeature"
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle chassis platform"
]

instance ROS2Network : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Internal ROS2 communication network for intra-entity data exchange"
]

instance 3DVisualizationFeature : DTDFVocab:Feature [
    base:desc "ROS2-based 3D rendering component for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ControlPanelFeature : DTDFVocab:Feature [
    base:desc "Human interface component for remote management and control operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:produces ControlCommandsData
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** includes:
  - **Control commands** from the DT’s **Digital Twin Entity** to the physical twin:
    - **ACC Control FE**: Computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (per ISO 15622) and sends commands to the **Actuation FE**.
    - **Remote management commands** via the **Control Panel UI**:
      - Enable/disable ACC.
      - Set desired speed.
      - Trigger emergency braking (via speed controller).
  - **Actuation FE** translates commands into **motor voltage commands** and steering servo adjustments, executed by the vehicle’s hardware.
  - **Data Translation FE** ensures compatibility between DT and physical twin communication protocols (e.g., ROS2 message types, unit conversions)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time-scale adheres to:
  - **Latency Constraint**: End-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity is **≤100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Components must synchronize clocks with **≤100 ms accuracy** for event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Processing Frequency**: Object tracking and data updates occur at **real-time rates** (no explicit frequency specified, but aligned with 100 ms latency bounds)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation consists of:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle** (Jetson Orin Nano hardware).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed externally (cloud-based) to handle computation offloading and data storage.
  - **User Entity**: Hosts **3D Visualization FE** (onboard/remote) and **Control Panel FE** (remote management).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Manages **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication (ROS2 intra-entity, Wi-Fi inter-entity)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Development of DT architecture (ISO 23247-based) and requirements (e.g., real-time data monitoring, remote management).
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: Retrofitting the **1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle** with autonomy hardware (Jetson, LiDAR, cameras).
  - **Operational Phase**: Real-time monitoring, computation offloading, and remote control of ACC during vehicle operation.
  The DT represents the **as-operated** state of the physical twin, enabling cyber-physical experimentation and validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity** are addressed through:
  - **Verification**:
    - **Latency compliance**: Ensured **≤100ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP TS 22.185).
    - **Clock synchronization**: **≤100ms accuracy** (critical for distributed systems).
    - **Data integrity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures message alignment and unit conversions.
  - **Validation**:
    - **ACC compliance**: Implemented **ISO 15622** performance class I control logic.
    - **Real-world testing**: Deployed on **1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle** with **LiDAR, depth camera, and ROS2 middleware**.
    - **Uncertainty handling**:
      - **Sensor noise**: Mitigated via **Kalman filtering** for object tracking.
      - **Latency variability**: Monitored via **ROS2 time synchronization** tools.
  - **Uncertainty sources**:
    - **Sensing**: LiDAR/depth camera calibration errors (addressed via **DBSCAN clustering**).
    - **Actuation**: Motor voltage command precision (aligned with **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** specifications)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical network connection** includes:
  - **Intra-entity communication**:
    - **ROS2 network**: Low-latency, high-throughput inter-process communication (IPC) for **Physical Twin Entity** and **Digital Twin Entity**.
  - **Inter-entity communication**:
    - **Wi-Fi**: Point-to-point link between **DT Entity (cloud)** and **Physical Twin Entity (vehicle)**, ensuring **≤100ms latency**.
    - **Protocols**:
      - **ROS2** (for intra-entity messaging).
      - **Wi-Fi 802.11** (for inter-entity communication).
      - **Data Translation FE**: Serializes/deserializes messages (e.g., ROS2 topics) and converts units (e.g., meters to pixels)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **DT hosting/deployment** is structured as:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**:
    - Deployed on **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard the vehicle) for **real-time processing** (e.g., point cloud clustering, ACC control).
    - **Middleware**: ROS2 + **Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2)** for application integration.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**:
    - Hosted **externally** (cloud-based) for **computation offloading** (e.g., ACC logic, data storage).
    - **Storage**: SQL databases for **historical data** (e.g., reports, timeseries).
    - **Visualization**: **3D rendering** via ROS2-based UI components (e.g., **3D Visualization FE**).
  - **Deployment architecture**:
    - **Onboard**: Jetson devices (sensors, actuators).
    - **Offboard**: Cloud servers (data storage, computation)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following **standards**:
  1. **Digital Twin Standards**:
     - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (RA) adapted for automotive DTs (e.g., entity-based structure: **Physical Twin Entity**, **Digital Twin Entity**, **User Entity**).
     - **ISO/IEC 30173:2023**: Concepts and terminology (high-level, not architecture-specific).
  2. **Automotive Standards**:
     - **ISO 15622**: ACC performance requirements (performance class I).
     - **3GPP TS 22.185**: V2V communication service requirements (≤100ms latency).
  3. **Middleware Standards**:
     - **ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)**: For inter-component communication and modularity.
     - **OPC UA (IEC 62541)**: Potential for **Data Translation FE** (not explicitly implemented but referenced as a feasible option)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include:
  - **Latency**: **≤100 ms** end-to-end latency for real-time control (critical for ACC).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: **≤100 ms accuracy** for distributed systems.
  - **Safety-Critical Nature**: DT operates in a **Human-in-the-Loop** mode (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin per Liberty to act vs. Ability to act taxonomy).
  - **Hardware Constraints**: No explicit security protocols (e.g., encryption) or fault tolerance mechanisms mentioned; focus on latency and clock sync for safety."
]
